verses.2: Who has raised up one from the east?
verses.4: Who has worked and done it,
verses.5: The islands have seen, and fear.
verses.7: So the carpenter encourages the goldsmith.
verses.9: you whom I have taken hold of from the ends of the earth,
verses.10: Don’t you be afraid, for I am with you.
verses.11: Behold, all those who are incensed against you will be disappointed and confounded.
verses.12: You will seek them, and won’t find them,
verses.13: For I, the LORD your God, will hold your right hand,
verses.14: Don’t be afraid, you worm Jacob,
verses.15: Behold, I have made you into a new sharp threshing instrument with teeth.
verses.17: The poor and needy seek water, and there is none.
verses.18: I will open rivers on the bare heights,
verses.19: I will put cedar, acacia, myrtle, and oil trees in the wilderness.
verses.20: that they may see, know, consider, and understand together,
verses.21: Produce your cause,” says the LORD.
verses.22: “Let them announce and declare to us what will happen!
verses.23: Declare the things that are to come hereafter,
verses.25: “I have raised up one from the north, and he has come,
verses.26: Who has declared it from the beginning, that we may know?
verses.27: I am the first to say to Zion, ‘Behold, look at them;’
verses.28: When I look, there is no man,
verses.29: Behold, all of their deeds are vanity and nothing.
